overview: Production-grade Annual General Meeting (AGM) management app with Excel shareholder import, real-time check-in via QR codes, live attendance dashboard, role-based access, full audit trail, and offline-first PWA support. Premium green-themed UI optimized for desktop, tablet, and low-end Android devices.
features: Excel/CSV shareholder import with column mapping and duplicate detection
In-Person and Proxy registration with verification codes and fraud prevention
QR code generation and fast scan-to-check-in workflow
Live metrics dashboard with attendance analytics and quorum status
Role-based access: Super Admin, Registration Officer, Viewer
Full audit trail with CSV export for compliance
Advanced reporting: attendance, proxy, no-show, and badge/pass generation
Offline-first PWA with local caching and auto-sync
Encrypted sensitive data with masked ID display
Premium green-themed UI with large touch controls
